summary.title: Add Phase 6 core API endpoints, typed client, and integration tests
summary.description: Introduces organization-scoped Phase 6 REST endpoints for categories, suppliers, units of measure, buildings, rooms, sections, bins, items, inventory balances/transactions, attachments, reports, and audit logs. Adds database-backed authentication and permission middleware, local filesystem attachment storage with path-traversal guards, CSV export with formula injection mitigation, and a typed API client with convenience methods, query serialization, multipart upload support, and raw file/CSV handling. Includes integration tests for auth, CRUD, inventory mutations, attachments, and CSV safety, plus unit tests for the client and storage layer.

fileSummaries.summary: Append instruction for the coder agent to request todo tool execution via the primary agent.
Extend the OpenAPI document with path and response definitions for all new organization-scoped resource, inventory, attachment, report, and audit log endpoints.
Add role-permission test coverage for the new unitsOfMeasure view, create, update, and delete flags.

Add comprehensive integration tests covering authentication, membership enforcement, route permissions, CRUD/archive, duplicate SKU detection, tenant-scoped search, inventory transactions, insufficient stock handling, CSV export permissions and formula neutralization, attachment upload and file serving, audit log listing, and dynamic attribute filters.
Add unit tests for LocalAttachmentStorage verifying successful writes/reads, path traversal rejection, normalized path handling, and cross-organization access denial.
Import and register the new organization resource routes aggregator in the Hono application builder.
Implement middleware that queries the database to verify authentication, active tenant membership, and optional permission requirements, then sets a typed organizationContext on the request.
Include unitsOfMeasure view, create, update, and delete permissions in the viewer, manager, and staff role mappings.
Add helper functions to generate OpenAPI path items and response maps for all Phase 6 endpoints, merging them into the generated specification.
Implement attachment routes for listing, multipart upload, detail retrieval, and file serving with MIME type validation, primary-flag management, and inline content disposition.
Implement paginated audit log listing with filters for actor, action, entity type/id, and date range.

Implement inventory balance listing, bin scan resolution, and inventory transaction creation routes with type-specific permission checks for stock in, stock out, transfer, adjustment, and cycle count.
Implement item CRUD routes, detailed item retrieval with attributes and balances, and a list route supporting search, location filters, low-stock filtering, and dynamic attribute predicates.

Implement report query and CSV export routes with tenant-scoped SQL for inventory-by-item, inventory-by-location, low-stock, transaction-history, and inventory-value reports, including CSV formula injection mitigation.
Add shared route utilities for pagination metadata, CSV escaping, request metadata extraction, Zod request parsing, and mapping of domain/database errors to standardized HTTP responses.
Define Zod validation schemas for resources, inventory transactions, attachments, audit logs, reports, and list query parameters including dynamic attribute filters.
Aggregate and register all Phase 6 organization resource route modules including simple resources, items, inventory, attachments, reports, and audit logs.
Add reusable base Zod schemas for identifiers, nullable trimmed strings, pagination, sorting, status enums, boolean query preprocessing, dynamic attribute filters, and scan value queries.

Implement a generic CRUD route factory for simple resources and wire it to categories, suppliers, units of measure, buildings, rooms, sections, and bins with search, sort, parent validation, and archive support.
Add filesystem-based attachment storage that writes to an organization-specific directory with filename sanitization and enforces path containment on reads to prevent directory traversal.
Add package documentation with usage examples for categories, items, filtering, inventory transactions, attachment uploads, and CSV report exports.
Expand typed DTOs to cover all Phase 6 server payloads including collections, pagination, entities, inventory balances/transactions, attachments, report rows, audit logs, and query inputs.

Refactor ApiClient to support base URL normalization, JSON array/object query serialization, multipart POST uploads, raw file and CSV response handling, and add convenience methods for all Phase 6 endpoints.

Add unit tests for client construction, auth header injection, complex query serialization, bin scan targeting, inventory balance detail routes, multipart upload form data building, raw file responses, CSV export metadata parsing, and API error mapping.
Introduce unitsOfMeasure view, create, update, and delete permission flags and include them in the PermissionFlag union type.
Assert that the new unitsOfMeasure permissions are exported and included in the shared ALL_PERMISSION_FLAGS array.

review.reviewSummary: This PR introduces a broad set of core inventory API routes (categories, suppliers, units-of-measure, locations, items, inventory balances/transactions, attachments, reports, and audit logs), a database-backed organization context middleware, corresponding OpenAPI specs, API client DTOs/helpers, and extensive integration tests. It also wires up permission flags for unitsOfMeasure.

findings.title: Unhandled errors re-thrown from mapUnexpectedError
findings.body: mapUnexpectedError falls through to `throw error` for any exception that is not an `InventoryDomainError` or a Postgres `23505` unique-violation code. This breaks the API error-response contract and causes unhandled exceptions in route handlers instead of returning a clean 500 JSON response. All routes that rely on this helper (items, simple resources, attachments, inventory) are affected.

findings.title: Floating promise in test seed helper
findings.body: The `seedUser` helper calls `authRepository.createUser(...)` without `await`. Because the user record may not be persisted before the session is created or the test request runs, this introduces a race condition that makes integration tests flaky.

findings.title: CSV escape regex misses formula injection vectors
findings.body: `csvEscape` only neutralizes formula characters anchored to the absolute start of the string (`^[=+\\-@\\t\\r]`). Values that begin with a space followed by `=`, or a newline followed by `=`, will not be prefixed with `'` and may still execute as formulas when opened in spreadsheet applications. Consider trimming prior to the regex test or adding `\\n` and space to the prefix pattern.

findings.title: Implicit undefined return for unhandled report types
findings.body: `getReportRows` switches over `reportType` without a default case and has no return after the switch. Although the route validates the parameter with Zod today, any future drift between the schema enum and the switch cases will cause the endpoint to return `{ data: undefined }` instead of a proper error. Adding a default branch that returns an empty array or throws a domain error would make this safer.

actionableFindings.title: Unhandled errors re-thrown from mapUnexpectedError
actionableFindings.body: mapUnexpectedError falls through to `throw error` for any exception that is not an `InventoryDomainError` or a Postgres `23505` unique-violation code. This breaks the API error-response contract and causes unhandled exceptions in route handlers instead of returning a clean 500 JSON response. All routes that rely on this helper (items, simple resources, attachments, inventory) are affected.

actionableFindings.title: Floating promise in test seed helper
actionableFindings.body: The `seedUser` helper calls `authRepository.createUser(...)` without `await`. Because the user record may not be persisted before the session is created or the test request runs, this introduces a race condition that makes integration tests flaky.

actionableFindings.title: CSV escape regex misses formula injection vectors
actionableFindings.body: `csvEscape` only neutralizes formula characters anchored to the absolute start of the string (`^[=+\\-@\\t\\r]`). Values that begin with a space followed by `=`, or a newline followed by `=`, will not be prefixed with `'` and may still execute as formulas when opened in spreadsheet applications. Consider trimming prior to the regex test or adding `\\n` and space to the prefix pattern.

actionableFindings.title: Implicit undefined return for unhandled report types
actionableFindings.body: `getReportRows` switches over `reportType` without a default case and has no return after the switch. Although the route validates the parameter with Zod today, any future drift between the schema enum and the switch cases will cause the endpoint to return `{ data: undefined }` instead of a proper error. Adding a default branch that returns an empty array or throws a domain error would make this safer.

inlineFindings.title: Unhandled errors re-thrown from mapUnexpectedError
inlineFindings.body: mapUnexpectedError falls through to `throw error` for any exception that is not an `InventoryDomainError` or a Postgres `23505` unique-violation code. This breaks the API error-response contract and causes unhandled exceptions in route handlers instead of returning a clean 500 JSON response. All routes that rely on this helper (items, simple resources, attachments, inventory) are affected.

inlineFindings.title: Floating promise in test seed helper
inlineFindings.body: The `seedUser` helper calls `authRepository.createUser(...)` without `await`. Because the user record may not be persisted before the session is created or the test request runs, this introduces a race condition that makes integration tests flaky.

artifacts.finalOverviewBody:
## OverReview

**Add Phase 6 core API endpoints, typed client, and integration tests**

Introduces organization-scoped Phase 6 REST endpoints for categories, suppliers, units of measure, buildings, rooms, sections, bins, items, inventory balances/transactions, attachments, reports, and audit logs. Adds database-backed authentication and permission middleware, local filesystem attachment storage with path-traversal guards, CSV export with formula injection mitigation, and a typed API client with convenience methods, query serialization, multipart upload support, and raw file/CSV handling. Includes integration tests for auth, CRUD, inventory mutations, attachments, and CSV safety, plus unit tests for the client and storage layer.

Needs attention: yes
Commits considered: 6
Files reviewed: 26
Actionable findings: 4
Inline comments posted: 2

### File Summaries
- `.opencode/agents/coder-agent.md`: Append instruction for the coder agent to request todo tool execution via the primary agent.
- `apps/api/openapi.json`: Extend the OpenAPI document with path and response definitions for all new organization-scoped resource, inventory, attachment, report, and audit log endpoints.
- `apps/api/src/__tests__/authorization.test.ts`: Add role-permission test coverage for the new unitsOfMeasure view, create, update, and delete flags.
- `apps/api/src/__tests__/integration/resource-api.integration.test.ts`: Add comprehensive integration tests covering authentication, membership enforcement, route permissions, CRUD/archive, duplicate SKU detection, tenant-scoped search, inventory transactions, insufficient stock handling, CSV export permissions and formula neutralization, attachment upload and file serving, audit log listing, and dynamic attribute filters.
- `apps/api/src/__tests__/local-attachment-storage.test.ts`: Add unit tests for LocalAttachmentStorage verifying successful writes/reads, path traversal rejection, normalized path handling, and cross-organization access denial.
- `apps/api/src/app/create-app.ts`: Import and register the new organization resource routes aggregator in the Hono application builder.
- `apps/api/src/auth/middleware/database-organization-context.ts`: Implement middleware that queries the database to verify authentication, active tenant membership, and optional permission requirements, then sets a typed organizationContext on the request.
- `apps/api/src/auth/services/role-mappings.ts`: Include unitsOfMeasure view, create, update, and delete permissions in the viewer, manager, and staff role mappings.
- `apps/api/src/openapi/generate.ts`: Add helper functions to generate OpenAPI path items and response maps for all Phase 6 endpoints, merging them into the generated specification.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/attachments-routes.ts`: Implement attachment routes for listing, multipart upload, detail retrieval, and file serving with MIME type validation, primary-flag management, and inline content disposition.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/audit-logs-routes.ts`: Implement paginated audit log listing with filters for actor, action, entity type/id, and date range.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/inventory-routes.ts`: Implement inventory balance listing, bin scan resolution, and inventory transaction creation routes with type-specific permission checks for stock in, stock out, transfer, adjustment, and cycle count.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/items-routes.ts`: Implement item CRUD routes, detailed item retrieval with attributes and balances, and a list route supporting search, location filters, low-stock filtering, and dynamic attribute predicates.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/reports-routes.ts`: Implement report query and CSV export routes with tenant-scoped SQL for inventory-by-item, inventory-by-location, low-stock, transaction-history, and inventory-value reports, including CSV formula injection mitigation.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/resource-route-support.ts`: Add shared route utilities for pagination metadata, CSV escaping, request metadata extraction, Zod request parsing, and mapping of domain/database errors to standardized HTTP responses.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/resource-schemas.ts`: Define Zod validation schemas for resources, inventory transactions, attachments, audit logs, reports, and list query parameters including dynamic attribute filters.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/resources.ts`: Aggregate and register all Phase 6 organization resource route modules including simple resources, items, inventory, attachments, reports, and audit logs.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/schemas.ts`: Add reusable base Zod schemas for identifiers, nullable trimmed strings, pagination, sorting, status enums, boolean query preprocessing, dynamic attribute filters, and scan value queries.
- `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/simple-resources.ts`: Implement a generic CRUD route factory for simple resources and wire it to categories, suppliers, units of measure, buildings, rooms, sections, and bins with search, sort, parent validation, and archive support.
- `apps/api/src/storage/local-attachment-storage.ts`: Add filesystem-based attachment storage that writes to an organization-specific directory with filename sanitization and enforces path containment on reads to prevent directory traversal.
- `packages/api-client/README.md`: Add package documentation with usage examples for categories, items, filtering, inventory transactions, attachment uploads, and CSV report exports.
- `packages/api-client/src/dtos.ts`: Expand typed DTOs to cover all Phase 6 server payloads including collections, pagination, entities, inventory balances/transactions, attachments, report rows, audit logs, and query inputs.
- `packages/api-client/src/request.ts`: Refactor ApiClient to support base URL normalization, JSON array/object query serialization, multipart POST uploads, raw file and CSV response handling, and add convenience methods for all Phase 6 endpoints.
- `packages/api-client/test/request.test.ts`: Add unit tests for client construction, auth header injection, complex query serialization, bin scan targeting, inventory balance detail routes, multipart upload form data building, raw file responses, CSV export metadata parsing, and API error mapping.
- `packages/shared/src/permission-flags.ts`: Introduce unitsOfMeasure view, create, update, and delete permission flags and include them in the PermissionFlag union type.
- `packages/shared/test/shared.test.ts`: Assert that the new unitsOfMeasure permissions are exported and included in the shared ALL_PERMISSION_FLAGS array.

Change types: feature, test, docs, chore

artifacts.reviewBody:
## OverReview Summary

This PR introduces a broad set of core inventory API routes (categories, suppliers, units-of-measure, locations, items, inventory balances/transactions, attachments, reports, and audit logs), a database-backed organization context middleware, corresponding OpenAPI specs, API client DTOs/helpers, and extensive integration tests. It also wires up permission flags for unitsOfMeasure.

Needs attention: yes
Commits considered: 6
Files processed: 26
Actionable findings: 4
Inline comments posted: 2
Skipped findings: 0

### Additional Findings
- [non-critical] `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/resource-route-support.ts:67` CSV escape regex misses formula injection vectors: `csvEscape` only neutralizes formula characters anchored to the absolute start of the string (`^[=+\\-@\\t\\r]`). Values that begin with a space followed by `=`, or a newline followed by `=`, will not be prefixed with `'` and may still execute as formulas when opened in spreadsheet applications. Consider trimming prior to the regex test or adding `\\n` and space to the prefix pattern.
- [non-critical] `apps/api/src/routes/organizations/reports-routes.ts:150` Implicit undefined return for unhandled report types: `getReportRows` switches over `reportType` without a default case and has no return after the switch. Although the route validates the parameter with Zod today, any future drift between the schema enum and the switch cases will cause the endpoint to return `{ data: undefined }` instead of a proper error. Adding a default branch that returns an empty array or throws a domain error would make this safer.

inlineComments.body:
**Unhandled errors re-thrown from mapUnexpectedError**

mapUnexpectedError falls through to `throw error` for any exception that is not an `InventoryDomainError` or a Postgres `23505` unique-violation code. This breaks the API error-response contract and causes unhandled exceptions in route handlers instead of returning a clean 500 JSON response. All routes that rely on this helper (items, simple resources, attachments, inventory) are affected.

<!-- overreview:inline -->

**Floating promise in test seed helper**

The `seedUser` helper calls `authRepository.createUser(...)` without `await`. Because the user record may not be persisted before the session is created or the test request runs, this introduces a race condition that makes integration tests flaky.

Suggested replacement:

```
  await authRepository.createUser({
    id: input.userId,
    email: input.email,
    name: input.name,
    emailVerified: true,
  });
```

<!-- overreview:inline -->
